g.text: - Continue: all sprint artifacts approved and next phase/sprint still in scope -> BEV-002
- End: all required phase obligations complete and user/PM confirm closure -> BEV-008
- Pause: user/PM requests suspension or external dependency blocks progression -> BEV-009
- Resume: explicit user/PM resume decision after pause -> BEV-010
User role is mandatory in BIA-001 via BCO-002 assignment; PM cannot unilaterally close review.
